name: flutter-mvvm-template
description: Create Flutter MVVM apps with reusable base views, sealed page navigation, and common dialog UI.

interface.shortDescription: Create Flutter MVVM apps with sealed page navigation.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex skill and generator assets for creating Flutter apps with MVVM base classes, reusable page navigation, common alert/action sheet UI, and strongly typed sealed page routes.
defaultPrompt: Use $flutter-mvvm-template to create a Flutter MVVM app.
Generate a Flutter MVVM project with sealed page navigation.
Create a new Flutter MVVM sample project.
